feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Dispatcher, YELLOW, Running but Message Server unreachable
entry.content:
HI Team,

while starting the SAP dispatcher is not comming up and its show the error message as 

Dispatcher, YELLOW, Running but Message Server unreachable, 

Could you please help me on this 

Thanks 

Maladri

entry.title: stdavailablecapacityisvalid field cannot be cleared for First Interval in Work center.
entry.content:
Hi All,
I am currently working on developing work center module using SAP Core Data Services(CDS).I am referring the API document by SAP.
https://api.sap.com/api/OP_WORKCENTER_0001/path/post_WorkCenterCapacity__WorkCenterInternalID___WorkCenterTypeCode___CapacityCategoryAllocation___CapacityInternalID___Interval

I am facing some difficulties on Interval and Shifts section there.

As you know, we are having Create, Copy, Change Operations. 
For create operation, there is no issue in interval and shifts. 
If am trying to Copy from an existing work center, in intervals section, am getting an error like:

"stdavailablecapacityisvalid field cannot be cleared for First Interval",

My payload structure for _Interval is as follows:

entry.title: BAS Remote Extension Host Terminated
entry.content:
I started getting this annoying popup message in BAS that keeps coming up every few minutes

It doesn't say which extension is failing. It also keeps opening Storyline tab for my project. Very disruptive.

The only help I could find online is people saying install local VSCode instead. I can't do that in our client environments.

Can someone please tell me how to rectify this situation? I've opened an SAP ticket, but they have not responded now for a long time.

Would appreciate any help. Thanks

entry.title: How to deploy Custom UI5 application onto SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public edition?
entry.content:
Hi community,
I have a scenario for creating a custom application and deploying it as a tile on the S4 HANA Cloud Public edition's FLP.

Using eclipse ADT, I have connected my dev system of HANA Public Cloud, and created a Custom Package under the Super package ZCUSTOM_DEVELPOMENT (so that the development objects can be moved to T and P systems).

My custom package holds the following objects:

  1. Custom database tables
  2. Custom ABAP Classes to handle the logic on the tables
  3. The IAM application / Business Configurations (based on few tables) to maintain data from the user side
  4. Custom root view entities on top of the ABAP classes
  5. The  service bindings and service definitions of the custom root view entities (their respective authorization objects).
  6. Custom Business catalog to store the IAM applications which are published to the HANA Cloud.

Process: (Backend)

  1. Created custom Z* Package to store the custom build objects.
  2. Created database tables to store the data.
  3. For a few tables, the business configuration objects are created to expose those tables on the HANA Cloud to maintain data.
  4. Created custom ABAP classes to handle the logic on the data in the custom tables.
  5. Created custom root entities and implemented the if_rap_query_provides~select method to handle the HTTPS calls when the root entities are exposed as an API. (Ref: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-a4c-create-custom-entity.html)
  6. Created a service definition for the custom root entity.
  7. Created service binding on top of the service definition to expose them as an OData V4 API.

Process: (Frontend)

  1. Create BTP destination do SAMLAssertion authentication type to connect the HANA cloud system. (Ref: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/31876c06f99645f289d802f9c95fb62b.html?locale=en-US)
  2. Created a custom UI application using the template.
  3. Consume the exposed Odata V4 services in the application by providing the endpoints in manifest.json file, configure the BTP destination in UI5.yaml and xs-app.json file to connect the application to backend system.
  4. The application loads successfully and in the preview mode and the data flows in preview mode.
  5. Build the mta.yaml file to generate the .mtar file.
  6. Deploy the .mtar file to deploy the application to BTP.
  7. On successful deployment, the application is available under HTML5 Applications in BTP.

After performing all these step, how can we add this developed custom application as a FIORI tile onto the S4 HANA Public cloud FLP under a custom catalog, Custom role, custom space and page?

Tried Scenario:

  1. Create a custom tile using the application Custom Tiles on HANA Cloud Public edition FLP.
  2. Provided the deployed application URL in the details of the custom tile.
  3. During assigning the catalog, The custom catalog in which the IAM applications are added is not visible in the list of catalogs to assign. Rather it shows all the SAP Standard business catalogs

How to add this custom tile to the custom business catalog created using ADT on eclipse?

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.

entry.title: app/router preview looking for a deleted project's path instead of it's own
entry.content:
Hello,

As a newbie at UI5 development, I am following the tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

 

I decide to delete the original app MyHANAApp and instead created another App MyHANAApp2.

When I try to preview the ports, they do not work.

On previewing app/router, I got the below error:

#2.0#2024 12 02 18:00:02:348#+00:00#INFO#/Configuration#####m47c58h8##########m47c58h8#PLAIN##Replacing $XSAPPNAME will not take place - 'xsappname' property not found in UAA configuration.#

However, my package.json has the package name as MyHANApp2 and my mta.yaml also has the same name everywhere. On previewing Port 5000 from within MyHANAApp2, it gives the below error:

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.css'
    at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:457:20)
    at get html [as html] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.js:10:16)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/server.js:85:39
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:149:13)
    at Route.dispatch (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:119:3)
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:284:15
    at Function.process_params (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:346:12)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:280:10)

 

It looks for MyHANAApp which I have already deleted. 

Also I connected the app with the new HANA Cloud Instance MyHANAApp2-Dev, and deleted the previous HDI Container, However, on going to the Database Explorer tab and refreshing , it does not show the container, but on navigating directly from My HANA Projects or searching manually within the Database Explorer using the + icon, I am able to load the DB Container. Although I think this is irrelevant, but thought of mentioning still

 

I do not want to create a new project with the exact same name as the tutorial, so that I can understand how the various components are interlinked, by resolving this error.

 

It is possible, that I might be a little vague in describing the problem, please let me know if I missed out anything, or should explain anything else in more detail.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Not getting response in Change Set Action in MDK and responding with Failure in Mobile
entry.content:
Greetings,

I am working on MDK offline application where I have to Create Sales Order using Batch call (since deep insert is not possible in offline). I explored on it and find out it is possible through Change Set action. It is working through the Change Set action and moving to Success Action and creating the Sales Order. But I am not getting response in Change Set action result in Web and also when I tried in Mobile Svcs app it is moving to Failure Action. Here attached screenshots of CreateHeader, CreateItem and Change Set action.

In web it is moving to ResponseData.js and creating sales order but no response in action result & in Mobile it is moving to CreationFailure.js.

I have tried to put ResponseData.js file in individual action results but it doesn't work. And I am using Modal Page where I am triggering batch call and successfully creating the Sales Order in backend but in Mobile it is not working as Web.

 

Any response will be helpful.

Thanks and Regards,

Madhav

entry.title: How to display multiple different fragments on the same Object Page?
entry.content:
I created a Fiori Elements application using the list report & object page template.

I created a custom section by using "Add a custom section to an object page using extensions" with the Guided Development. It added a fragment file, where I created a table that displays a different entity than the one I used for my list report. This table is now displayed in the newly created section.

Now I would like to have a code for a different table with a different entity set, and I want to display either the first or the second table, depending on specific attributes of the current object. Sadly, I don't know how to do that, do I have to create a second fragment file and if so, how do I specify in my controller code which fragment is displayed in the section. 

I know how to access the object attributes, I just don't know how to tell the compiler, which fragment is supposed to be used.

entry.title: SAP BTP FIORI app Deployment to Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a question, Can I build an MTA App. (FIORI Elements like Worklist page) in SAP BTP Business App. Studio, pointing OData Service to On-Premise system and deploy the same MTA to Cloud foundry with "Managed App Router"?  Is that something possible? Please share the reference materials if anything out there.

Thanks in advance.

Thanks,

entry.title: [SAP MDK] Converting Binary to Base64 for Android/iOS
entry.content:
Hello MDK Community,

I am currently developing an application using MDK & Mobile Services, which needs to send a photo (from the attachment) to the SAP backend via REST upon pressing a button.
I have developed the following MDK rule (getImageString.js) to perform the conversion from the image obj to base64:

 

export default function getImageString(clientAPI) {
    var attachmControl = clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControl('SectionedTable0').getControl('AttachPhoto');
    var arrayBuffer = attachmControl.getValue()[0].content;
    return arrayBufferToBase64(arrayBuffer);
}

function arrayBufferToBase64(buffer) {
    var binary = '';
    var bytes = new Uint8Array(buffer);
    var len = bytes.byteLength;
    
    for (var i = 0; i < len; i++) {
        binary += String.fromCharCode(bytes[i]);
    }
    return window.btoa(binary);  //here is the problem!
}

 

Problem:

This script works fine in the browser (WebApp), but it fails on mobile devices (tested on an Android device) at the point of converting binary to base64 due to the use of the window, which is likely not recognized on mobile devices. The issue specifically occurs at the line:

 

return window.btoa(binary);

 

Question:

Is there an alternative method to convert binary to base64 that works on mobile devices (Android/iOS) or a method from the clientAPI interface that can be used for this conversion?
I am open to alternative solutions to achieve this functionality.

For reference, I'm using SAP Mobile Services for the backend orchestration and the latest MDK client version.
Thank you in advance for your assistance!
Best regards, Khaled

PS: For simplicity, this example assumes only one attachment.

entry.title: Is the side-by-side BTP training updated with new course content? Found some bugs
entry.content:
Looks like this course contents are updated with different business example.

from risk-management -> incident-management. Unfortunately, we cannot copy code to test by ourselves and demo exercises are not clearly defined. There are few more bugs in the new content.

How to copy code?

Is it announced anywhere that SAP BTP is going to update the course content?

Please guide on this. Thanks.

Ref: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp

entry.title: Re: BAS : "code: not found"
entry.content:
Hi @yannmiquel,

Edit: The original answer seems to have only worked temporarily for some reason. What works for the duration of the terminal session at least seems to be running "export GIT_EDITOR=vim" to bring up vim for editing commit messages.

---

Original answer:

What worked for me was to disable VS Code as terminal git editor. Git then just warns me about merge conflicts and asks to resolve them manually, which is fine for me because I'll do that in VS Code / BAS Source Control view anyway.

Warning: I was not able to make VS Code / BAS open any editor though, even after re-enabling that setting.

In BAS:

  • open settings (e.g. via "Preferences: Open Settings (UI)")
  • search for setting "Terminal Git Editor" (setting id "git.terminalGitEditor")
  • disable that setting
  • restart / open new terminal

On merge conflicts git now only shows this message:

 

 

Auto-merging test.txt
CONFLICT (content): Merge conflict in test.txt
Automatic merge failed; fix conflicts and then commit the result.

 

 

Kind regards,
Tobias

entry.title: How to Fetch Logged-In User Details Using SAP User API in Cloud Foundry?
entry.content:
Hi Community! 

I'm currently working on an SAP project deployed in Cloud Foundry, and I'm trying to fetch the logged-in user's details using the User API. My setup includes an xs-app.json with a route to /userapi/currentUser.

Here's what I'm trying to achieve:
Retrieve the user's full name and user ID.

entry.title: Cannot deploy SAP HANA Database Artifact
entry.content:
Hello,

I am following the tutorial below.

Create Calculation View in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Tutorials

And when I go through step 4 and try to deploy the Database Artifact, I got this error:


Prepared environment for deployment
npm WARN config production Use `--omit=dev` instead.
deploy@ /home/user/projects/kuberlin/db
├── @SAP/hana-client@2.22.32
└── @SAP/hdi-deploy@5.3.2


> start
> node node_modules/@sap/hdi-deploy/deploy.js --exit

VCAP_SERVICES: undefined
Deployment ended at 2024-12-09 13:28:24
Error: service ${service-name} not found; the service definition does not exist.
(0s 42ms)


* The terminal process "/bin/bash '-c', 'echo 'Prepared environment for deployment' && (npm ls --depth 0 --production || npm install) && (npm start -- --exit)'" terminated with exit code: 1.

 

Does anybody know what I am missing?

Thanks a lot.

Regards

entry.title: Planning for the Future: Insights on Transitioning from SAP C4C Sales Service Cloud V1 to V2
entry.content:
As we step into 2025, we are actively planning for the future of our SAP CX landscape and evaluating the transition from C4C V1 to V2. Currently, we have a globally live SAP C4C system with a mix of medium to complex PDI developments.

We are eager to hear from others who have successfully made this shift! Specifically, we’d love to learn about:

  • Your migration journey: How was the process of transitioning from V1 to V2?
  • Required tools and skills: What expertise did your team need? Did you leverage any specific tools or frameworks for the transition?
  • Change management strategies: How did you handle change management, both for development processes and for end-users?

For context, our team has solid experience Technically with : SAP CI (aka CPI), Kyma, and a basic understanding of BAS and CAP and 

Functionally : Lead to Order Processes.

We are looking for holistic insights into the implementation, challenges, and best practices for maintaining and optimizing the system post-migration.

Looking forward to engaging discussions and learning from your experiences!

Best regards,
Dhruvin

entry.title: Tutorials for Creating a full stack CAP application using separate layers of UI5, node.js and HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for tutorials, where I can build separate modules for Node.Js, UI5 and HANA, and then connect them together to form a fully fledged application, based on a use case from one of the previous projects I was a small part of, so as to upskill myself and apply the knowledge in my future projects. 

However, I could not find any tutorials, for connecting separately created modules to this purpose. 

 

Could anyone please help me with the same, where I can find the relevant resources?

 

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: CAP Fiori Application filter query length exceeds the default HTTP GET request length limit
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are developing a CAP Fiori application that displays a read-only report. The application retrieves data via an OData V4 service exposed from an ABAP backend.
 
The issue arises when user applies filters in the report. Since the backend metadata contains around 50 columns, the resulting query sometimes exceeds the default HTTP GET request length limit. As a result, the request automatically changes from GET to POST.
 
Although we include the CSRF token in the headers, the backend OData service responds with a "403 CSRF token missing" error when it receives the POST request. It seems the backend expects a CSRF token due to the method change but doesn"t recognize the token being sent.
 
Could you please advise on how to handle this situation or configure the system to avoid such errors?

 

Many Thanks,

Manoj

entry.title: Possible Issue with SAP Fiori Generator v1.16.0 (OData V4 Service Detection)
entry.content:
Hello @SAPSupport ,

I'm experiencing unexpected behavior with the SAP Fiori Generator (@sap/generator-fiori version 1.16.0) in the SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) when trying to create a List Report application based on an OData V4 UI service. Even though I'm selecting an OData V4 service, the generator seems to be defaulting to V2 templates, causing the generated application to render only a blank page.

Is this a known issue, or is there a workaround to ensure the generator adheres to OData V4 templates?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance on resolving this behavior.

Best regards,

entry.title: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app generation broken for RAP-based OData V4 service
entry.content:
Hi,

Environment details:

Backend - SAP S4HANA 2022 FPS02

SAP Business Application Studio Version: 1.93.1
UI5 Version 1.108.30

I am encountering a strange issue in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) while generating a Fiori List Report for a RAP-based OData V4 service. Despite the service being explicitly defined and recognized as OData V4, BAS/Fiori Tools incorrectly treat it as an OData V2 service and generate faulty configurations.

This issue affects all my previously deployed V4 services, which worked successfully earlier. However, when redeploying these services as duplicate apps for testing, BAS incorrectly interprets them as V2 services. As a result, the generated application is broken and fails to function both during preview in BAS and after deployment.

The app fails to load with the following errors:
"[ODataMetadata] initial loading of metadata failed"

"Invalid metadata document."

It is important to note that the same application and service work perfectly fine when previewed locally through Eclipse, which confirms that both the app and the generated OData V4 service, metadata are correct. 

Is anyone else facing a similar problem? App generation and deployment has worked absolutely fine in the past with the exact same steps.

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Business Application Studio project generated from wizard with errors with oDAta V4
entry.content:
Hi team 

We are trying to create apps in "Business Application Studio" on the BTP platform, but since this week we are finding that the wizard to create apps was updated and is generating the UI5 ​​project code with errors such as representing oData V4 as V2

the app created doesn't works

it has errors

the odata V4 was taken as V2

we need correct this issue because we don't have a way to modify our apps ui5.
Has anyone had the same problem? Or have you found any solution?

Regards!

entry.title: BAS: BTP ABAP Environment trial services are not loaded
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am trying to generate a Fiori application based on an OData service developed in the BTP ABAP Environment (trial). However, when I select the destination, the generator keeps loading the services.

I don't see any network request, but I saw the following messages in the console. 

Is anyone else experiencing the same issue?

Update:

I have executed the command below, which was successful.

`curl -v -i "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-b0f2992ctrial-dev.dest/sap/opu/odata/iwfnd/catalogservice;v=2/RecommendedSer
viceCollection?%24top=1"`
